docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $40.00 - SERVED OCT-08-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT WHITNER, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-06-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-06-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOZZI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAIVD WHITNER IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
RETURN MAIL - SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER SENT TO DEFENDANT - UNABLE TO FORWARD
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-18-2019 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION RE: RESET OF TRIAL DATE FOR NON-SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOZZI, JOSEPH
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL SENT BY COURT

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-30-2019 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-06-2019 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF JOSEPH SOZZI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID WHITNER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WILL NOT WAIVES SERVICE ISSUES. NO FURTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED AT THIS TIME. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-06-2019 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SOZZI, JOSEPH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WHITNER, DAVID $105.00 PRINCIPAL, $115.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $220.00, COURT FINDS CLEAN UP, WALL BOARD, AND KITCHEN CABINET EXPENSES TOTAL $1905. TENANT'S SECURITY DEPOSIT OF $1800 IS DEPLETED LEAVING A BALANCE OWING LANDLORD OF $105. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 10/23/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY SOZZI, JOSEPH AS TO DEFENDANT WHITNER, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-18-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY FILING OF PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
RECEIVED AFTER ENTRY OF DISMISSAL - PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT.
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 11/07/19. PER ENVELOPE, "RETURN TO SENDER."
